calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-18-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was continued to this date in hopes that Ms. Lum would obtain an Attorney. Ms. Lum is not present and no Counsel is here on her behalf. The Petition for Letters of Administration is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-28-2017 Continued To Apr-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Eva Lum in Propria Persona.

The Court expressed concern about Ms. Lum's request to be appointed as Administrator without an Attorney and explained how difficult and complicated administering as Estate can be. Ms. Lum stated that this is a simple matter, that her Father left a one quarter share of a property to the Brother and that the property was to be held for their Mother's benefit until her death. Ms. Lum also stated that her brother passed away in 2001, that they did not do anything with the Brother's Estate because her Mother was still alive, that her Mother passed away in December of 2015, that they need to move the property from her Brother's Estate to the Mother's Trust and that she has had difficulty finding an Attorney. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to April 18, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court strongly encourages Ms. Lum to speak with an Attorney and hire one.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-14-2017 Continued To Mar-28-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
